headline: Golden Dome / SHIELD: $151B Contract Vehicle + $3.2B Space-Based Interceptor Awards

impacted_tickers.role: Prime SHIELD awardee; strong SBI positioning

thesis: Golden Dome is the single largest missile defense procurement vehicle in US history at $151B ceiling. Space-based interceptor awards ($3.2B across 12 firms) confirm the architecture is advancing rapidly toward an initial 2028 capability. All major primes are on contract. Near-term catalyst: Congressional appropriations hearing and further task orders in Q3 2026. NOC and RTX are best-positioned single-name plays given existing interceptor IP.

options_implication.call_put_skew: Call skew across NOC, RTX, LMT; sector ETFs (ITA, DFEN) also benefiting
options_implication.iv_expectation: IV likely to EXPAND ahead of July Ankara NATO summit and Q3 Golden Dome task order announcements
options_implication.trade_structure: Long NOC/RTX call spreads 60-90 DTE; long ITA calls as lower-risk sector expression
options_implication.iv_crush_risk: Low — multiple catalysts remain (task orders, Ankara summit, SBI follow-ons)

headline: F/A-XX 6th-Gen Navy Fighter: August 2026 Contract Award — CNO Says One Bidder 'Can't Deliver'; NOC Favored

impacted_tickers.role: Finalist; first fighter production in 50+ years if awarded
Finalist; strained by F-47, quality issues; low market expectations

thesis: CNO statement that one bidder 'can't deliver on schedule' is widely read as Boeing, which is already committed to Air Force F-47 production. Northrop's April public design reveal signals confidence. A NOC win is transformational: first fighter jet in 50+ years, multi-decade program, potential $100B+ lifecycle value. Market has partially priced the probability but not the confirmation pop. Boeing loss is incremental negative, minimal additional downside given already depressed sentiment.

options_implication.direction: Long NOC; neutral-to-short BA on this specific catalyst
options_implication.call_put_skew: NOC call skew will build into August; BA put skew already elevated from separate issues
options_implication.iv_expectation: NOC IV will EXPAND into August announcement — enter now before vol bid
options_implication.trade_structure: NOC Aug/Sep call spread (e.g. 580/620 strikes); or long straddle if Boeing surprise possible. BA: existing puts sufficient hedge.
options_implication.iv_crush_risk: HIGH post-announcement — exit before award date or roll immediately after

headline: Low-Cost Containerized Missiles (LCCM): 10,000+ Missiles, $10B+ Ceiling — Assessment Buys Begin June 2026

impacted_tickers.role: Adjacent JASSM program; watch for substitution risk
LCCM competes with Tomahawk at lower price point

thesis: LDOS is the primary public-market beneficiary. 3,000 initial units + $10B+ IDIQ ceiling represents multi-year revenue visibility. Iran conflict demand signal validates urgency. Assessment-phase test buys start NOW (June 2026), meaning near-term contract flow activity. Anduril (private) captures Barracuda side. RTX faces pricing pressure as LCCM undercuts Tomahawk unit economics.

options_implication.direction: Long LDOS; mildly short RTX on munitions mix shift
options_implication.call_put_skew: LDOS call skew building; RTX put skew moderate
options_implication.iv_expectation: LDOS IV may expand into next earnings as guidance raise becomes expected
options_implication.trade_structure: LDOS long calls 60-90 DTE; pair with RTX put spread as hedge

headline: Perennial Autonomy $500M C-UAS Contract — Largest Single Counter-Drone Award in Pentagon History

impacted_tickers.role: Legacy C-UAS incumbent losing share to AI-native startups
Lost bid on this specific vehicle
Sector sentiment positive on AI drone tech spending

thesis: Signal is structural, not one-off: DoD is codifying Ukraine-proven, AI-native C-UAS doctrine as standard procurement. Perennial (private, Eric Schmidt) captures the direct value. Public impact is RTX margin compression on C-UAS line as Pentagon signals preference for cheap/fast interceptors over expensive legacy systems. ETF expressions (DFEN, ITA, SHLD) capture the broader AI-defense buildout.

options_implication.direction: Mildly bearish RTX specific to C-UAS; bullish defense AI/drone ETFs
options_implication.call_put_skew: RTX light put skew on C-UAS news; ETF call skew building
options_implication.iv_expectation: No single large vol event; gradual RTX repricing
options_implication.trade_structure: RTX put spread (downside limited; company has many other programs). DFEN/ITA calls 30-60 DTE.
options_implication.iv_crush_risk: Low — no binary event; directional drift

timeline: Days to weeks (sector rotation); months (fundamental repricing)

headline: Shipbuilding Surge: $27B FY2026 + One Big Beautiful Bill Funds Two Virginia SSNs + Hadrian AI Facility

impacted_tickers.role: Primary Virginia-class and Columbia SSN/SSBN builder
Electric Boat — Virginia-class co-prime; $2.3B contract mod

thesis: Bipartisan $27.2B shipbuilding appropriation + One Big Beautiful Bill injection is the largest peacetime maritime investment in decades. AUKUS Pillar 1 rotational deployments begin 2027, amplifying demand. HII and GD are direct revenue beneficiaries with multi-year backlog locked. AI production systems (ShipOS/Hadrian) add margin expansion potential for LDOS. Key risk: shipyard labor capacity constraints remain a ceiling on delivery rates.

options_implication.call_put_skew: HII and GD call skew; steady accumulation play
options_implication.iv_expectation: IV low — no single binary event; underlying drift bullish
options_implication.trade_structure: HII/GD long calls or stock with protective puts given macro risk. 90-180 DTE preferred for multi-catalyst exposure.

headline: China Rare Earth Wave 2 Suspension EXPIRES November 2026 — Five Additional REEs Return to Full Control; No Extension Confirmed

impacted_tickers.role: US domestic REE miner/processor; direct beneficiary of any China restriction snap-back
Lutetium in EUV lithography supply chain

thesis: HIGHEST CONVICTION MACRO TRADE FOR Q3/Q4 2026. The May 2026 US-China summit produced no binding renewal commitment for the Wave 2 suspension. If the November 2026 expiry is not extended, five additional rare earth elements (samarium, gadolinium, lutetium + others) return to full PRC export licensing simultaneously. This is a supply shock event for defense primes and EV/semiconductor supply chains. MP Materials is the clearest public-market beneficiary. The market is underpricing this tail risk. Watch for: (1) any State Dept announcement of extension as covering event; (2) DoD critical materials exemption orders as bullish MP signal.

options_implication.direction: Long MP calls; hedges on LMT/RTX via put spreads
options_implication.call_put_skew: MP call skew will build as November approaches; defense prime put skew as supply chain risk reprices
options_implication.iv_expectation: IV on MP will EXPAND significantly into October/November. Enter now.
options_implication.trade_structure: MP long calls Sep/Oct/Nov expiry (ladder into expiry date); LMT/RTX put spreads as supply chain hedge.
options_implication.iv_crush_risk: High if extension announced — set stop-loss on MP calls at extension news

timeline: Weeks to months (November 2026 expiry is the hard catalyst)

headline: NATO Ankara Summit July 7-8, 2026: 5% GDP Defense Spending Target — European Rearmament Acceleration
thesis: Ankara is a pre-positioned catalyst. Trump's 5% GDP target is driving concrete allied procurement decisions ahead of the summit to demonstrate compliance. European spending +20% YoY in 2025 already; Ankara will set 2027-2030 acquisition roadmaps. US primes capture FMS (Foreign Military Sales) flow. German Rheinmetall (RHM.DE) is the standout European single-name with largest ammunition and vehicle ramp. Key downside risk: Ukraine exclusion from summit agenda creates political noise but does not change procurement fundamentals.

options_implication.direction: Long US defense primes into July summit; long RHM.DE as European expression
options_implication.call_put_skew: Call skew on ITA/LMT/RTX/NOC into July; RHM on European exchanges
options_implication.iv_expectation: IV likely to EXPAND into summit then CRUSH post-announcement unless surprise commitments
options_implication.trade_structure: Long ITA calls or straddle into summit for vol expansion trade; single-name longs in LMT/RTX for FMS order flow.
options_implication.iv_crush_risk: MODERATE — buy before July, manage through summit

headline: JHTO Hypersonic S2MARTS Awards: Kratos, Leidos, GoHypersonic — $68M Across Six Vendors (Feb 2026)

impacted_tickers.role: Thermal protection systems; hypersonic materials test & eval
Adjacent LRHW and Dark Eagle programs

thesis: S2MARTS OTAs signal DoD is accelerating hypersonics R&D pipeline across a broader vendor base. Kratos (KTOS) is the standout public-market small-cap beneficiary — hypersonic materials + drones + autonomous systems is its core thesis. Contract values are modest ($68M total) but OTA awards historically precede larger EMD contracts. Watch KTOS for follow-on awards in H2 2026.

options_implication.call_put_skew: KTOS call skew; small-cap vol elevated
options_implication.iv_expectation: KTOS IV elevated baseline; watch for follow-on awards as spike catalyst
options_implication.trade_structure: KTOS long calls or long stock + protective put. 90 DTE preferred.

headline: Supreme Court IEEPA Ruling + 10% Universal Tariff: Trade Policy Framework Shift (Feb 2026)

impacted_tickers.role: Broad industrial tariff cost pass-through uncertainty
Safe haven bid on trade uncertainty
Flight to safety vs. inflation concerns

thesis: SCOTUS invalidated IEEPA as tariff authority, forcing Trump to use Section 122 (10% universal tariff). This is legally weaker and time-limited (150 days), creating policy uncertainty cliff risk. Copper tariff decision due by June 30, 2026 per OMB direction — watch for announcement this week. Defense primes largely insulated (domestic procurement). Industrials and import-dependent sectors face margin pressure. Copper tariff could benefit FCX, SCCO if domestic production preference codified.

options_implication.direction: GLD calls; copper miners (FCX, SCCO) calls on copper tariff announcement; XLI puts as hedge
options_implication.call_put_skew: GLD call skew; FCX call skew building into June 30 copper announcement
options_implication.iv_expectation: FCX/SCCO IV to EXPAND into copper tariff decision; buy now
options_implication.trade_structure: FCX long calls June 30/July expiry for copper decision catalyst; GLD calls as macro hedge

timeline: IMMEDIATE — copper tariff decision due by June 30, 2026

headline: LMT F-35 EW Modernization $991M + $3.6B Logistics Mod — Steady Sustainment Flow Within Guidance

impacted_tickers.role: Prime on all F-35 awards; sustainment cadence in line with guidance

thesis: F-35 sustainment awards ($991M EW + $3.6B logistics) are within expected run-rate. Not a step-change catalyst but confirm backlog is intact. Key watch: Q2 2026 earnings delivery pace and margin guidance. F-35 delivery shortfalls (engine/supply issues) remain the swing factor. Long-term: F-47 and F/A-XX program budget competition is the structural headwind for LMT platform growth.

options_implication.direction: Neutral; slight call skew on earnings beat probability
options_implication.call_put_skew: Balanced; slight call skew if sector continues rally
options_implication.iv_expectation: IV likely to compress post-awards; may expand ahead of Q2 earnings
options_implication.trade_structure: LMT stock or covered call strategy; no aggressive directional options play warranted here
